data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: Design is minimalistic to ensure ease of use for all demographics.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive interface with minimal navigation steps.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interface is designed for quick access to frequently used features.
data.technical_spec: Placement of buttons and menus for easy reachability.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Reduces choice complexity, ensuring faster decision-making by users.
data.technical_spec: Default settings taking precedence; additional options only when needed.

data.title: Feedback and Response Time
data.description: Immediate feedback on user actions to indicate successful operations.
data.technical_spec: Loading indicators and haptic feedback where applicable.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Uniform design language across platforms for consistent user experience.
data.technical_spec: Use of shared resources and guidelines like Material Design or Apple's Human Interface Guidelines.
